creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
According to:

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/games.html#crossfire

none of the distfiles are available for download.  This is probably because
there is a newer version of crossfire that only a couple of the sites
actually carry (that I could verify) in an old/ directory.  I've included a 
diff to point MASTER_SITES to the old/ dir on the sites that carry it.  This
list came from:

http://crossfire.real-time.com/Website_Index/Download/download.html

	I don't know much of anything about this port, otherwise I would have taken
a stab at updating it, which would be the correct way to deal with this.
